items.name: Vacant Home Staging
items.short: Empty rooms, fully imagined. We dress every surface so buyers feel home the moment the door opens.
items.description: From living rooms to primary suites, we furnish and accessorize every key space with curated, livable luxury that drives faster offers and stronger comps.
items.imageAlt: Fully staged open-concept kitchen and dining room with brass pendants and warm neutrals

items.name: Occupied Home Staging
items.short: Working with what's already loved. Refining, editing, and elevating the home buyers will actually see.
items.description: We blend a homeowner's existing furnishings with our curated accessories and art to create a refined, market-ready impression without disrupting daily life.
items.imageAlt: Refined occupied living room with sectional, crystal chandelier, and cowhide rug

items.name: Interior Design
items.short: Spaces designed to be lived in. Quiet luxury that holds up to a real Southern California life.
items.description: Full-service interior design for homeowners who want a thoughtfully composed space, from material palettes to custom furnishings, tailored to the way you actually live.
items.imageAlt: Designed primary bedroom with brass mirror, sage accent wall, and refined linens

items.name: Staging Consultations
items.short: A one-visit walkthrough with a clear, room-by-room playbook to get a home buyer-ready.
items.description: For agents and sellers preparing to list, we walk the home and leave you with a prioritized list of moves: what to keep, edit, repair, repaint, and add. Fast.
items.imageAlt: Styled vignette with fluted candle bowl and curated accessories
